Masked Special Forces

Masked Special Forces is a multiplayer first-person shooter game with a myriad of customization options. The game puts you in the shoes of a commander in the battle arena. As a talented warrior, team up, strategize, and take down the opponents one by one. Access to an array of upgradable weapons, armory, kill messages, and victory dances on the main menu.

Play Masked Special Forces Online

Loading game...
About Masked Special Forces

Masked Special Forces is a multiplayer first-person shooter game with a myriad of customization options. The game puts you in the shoes of a commander in the battle arena. As a talented warrior, team up, strategize, and take down the opponents one by one. Access to an array of upgradable weapons, armory, kill messages, and victory dances on the main menu. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Masked Special Forces in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Action game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Masked Special Forces for free?

Yes. Masked Special Forces is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Masked Special Forces?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
